metadata.name: New Module
metadata.author: Unknown
metadata.description: The royal treasury was plundered and its relics hidden in dungeons across the realm. Reclaim them and return them to the vault in Ravenvale.

towns.name: Ravenvale
towns.description: A riverside town whose docks hum with the comings and goings of barges.

towns.name: Driftglen
towns.description: A crossroads town where adventurers gather to share rumours and ale.

towns.name: Briarhold
towns.description: A fortified settlement perched on a rocky bluff overlooking the valley.

towns.name: Fernford
towns.description: A quiet hamlet nestled among rolling hills, known for its warm hearths.

towns.name: Amberport
towns.description: A walled outpost on the frontier, always on guard against the wilds.

towns.name: IGNORE
towns.description: A sleepy village surrounded by ancient oaks and whispering meadows.

towns.name: IGNORE
towns.description: A hillside town whose cobbled streets wind between stone cottages.

towns.name: IGNORE
towns.description: A forest clearing settlement where druids and woodsmen live side by side.

key_dungeons.name: Rotting Stronghold
key_dungeons.description: The air around Rotting Stronghold shimmers with faint heat. Strange runes glow along the doorframe.
key_dungeons.quest_objective: Purge Rotting Stronghold of evil and secure the Obsidian Key
key_dungeons.quest_hint: Dark forces have claimed this place as their own.
